name: Risk Controller
description: Validuje obchody proti risk pravidlům. Má právo vetovat. Temperature 0 = deterministický.

config.query: SELECT id, trade_card, entry_price, stop_loss, position_size_usdt, risk_amount_usdt, confidence_score, created_at, expires_at FROM signals WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'analyzed'
SELECT available_capital, total_value, today_pnl_usdt, month_pnl_usdt, month_start_capital, consecutive_losses, last_loss_at, system_active, system_stop_reason FROM portfolio WHERE id = 1
SELECT id, coin, direction, entry_price, position_size_usdt, current_stop, entry_time FROM trades WHERE status = 'open'
SELECT id, coin, pnl_usdt, exit_time, exit_reason FROM trades WHERE status = 'closed' AND exit_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY exit_time DESC
UPDATE signals SET status = $2, risk_checks = $3, rejection_reason = $4, decided_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1
UPDATE portfolio SET system_active = false, system_stop_reason = $1, system_stop_until = $2, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = 1
